name: systematize-framework-workspace
description: Workspace verification and governance docs tooling for the Systematize Framework

scripts.generate:docs: npm run sync:commands && node .Systematize/scripts/node/lib/generate-command-runtime-map.mjs && node .Systematize/scripts/node/lib/generate-command-surface-docs.mjs && node .Systematize/scripts/node/lib/generate-project-tree.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:language && npm run verify:contracts
